name: Nava Nakorn Public Company Limited
summary: Nava Nakorn Public Company Limited operates as a real estate development company in Thailand. It operates in two segments, Real Estate Business and Utilities Services Business. The company It develops industrial promotion zone projects for trading and leasing. It also provides utilities and other facilities services in the industrial promotion zone. The company was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Khlong Luang, Thailand.
